pi_items.source: ABB IRB 120 official specifications (Lower arm length is 270 mm; 290 mm is the base height)
ABB IRB 120 official specifications (Upper arm horizontal length)
ABB IRB 120 official specifications (Max reach is 580 mm, not 592 mm)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates without pre-existing datasets, requiring the agent to synthesize a GeoGebra model. Analysis of the ABB IRB 120 specifications reveals multiple contradictions in the task's prompt and metadata: the actual lower arm length is 270 mm (not 290 mm, which is the base height), and the maximum reach is 580 mm (not 592 mm). Furthermore, the task's evaluation logic contradicts the metadata; verifier.py uses a length tolerance of 2.0 (not 1.0) and requires a viewport width of >200 (not 500.0). The expected output filename and upper arm horizontal length (302 mm) correctly align with task expectations and robot specifications.
